examples: It would be tragic if her talent remained unrecognized.
There is the possibility that hypothermia can go unrecognized.
The problem of ageism in the workplace often goes unrecognized.
But for 401(k) investors the sources of financial noise can be unexpected or worse, completely unrecognized.
In the scans, Reeves spotted cracks in the walls that could indicate two previously unrecognized "ghost" doorways lay behind.
